items.summary: In the admin Video Management Panel (VideoManagementPanel.tsx), display geographic view breakdown data for videos that already have recorded views — not only for views captured after the feature was introduced. The country breakdown panel must show all view records currently stored in `videoViewRecords`, regardless of when they were recorded. If existing view records have no country data (e.g., country is empty or unknown), display them as 'Unknown' in the breakdown list.

In the backend (main.mo), when returning per-video view records via the geographic view query function, do not filter out records that have an empty or missing country field. Ensure that all stored view records — including those recorded before country capture was implemented — are returned to the caller so the frontend can display them (grouping unknowns as 'Unknown').
